name: Path Traversal: '\\UNC\share\name\' (Windows UNC Share)
description: The product does not properly neutralize Windows UNC share paths ('\\server\share\') in user-supplied input, allowing attackers to redirect file access to remote network shares or arbitrary locations.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path starting with '\\' (UNC prefix) that flows to STORAGE[file_access] or EXTERNAL[network_file] without a CONTROL node that rejects UNC paths or restricts access to local filesystem only
